stemHtml:
According to the following METAR:

LSGG 241420Z 21001KT 2200 SN FEW003 BKN030 01/00 Q1020

Which of the following statements are correct?

1) Few clouds with a base at 300 ft AGL 
2) Few clouds with a base at 3000 ft ASL 
3) Scattered clouds with a base at 1000 ft AGL 
4) Moderate snow is falling
